name: awaiting-collateral-activated
rationale: Refinance with LTV >80% triggers F2.AC state transition: workflow_state transitions from active → awaiting_collateral. Distinct from D01 (which asserts F4.HL generator content); B06 asserts the state transition itself. Pair B06 + D01 to fully characterize the high-LTV path: state + generator-content.
notes: Single-event sequence. Different borrower from D01 to permit cross-cluster assertion attribution.
